infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Rinsebase uses your camera to take before and after photos of cleaning jobs.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Rinsebase accesses your photo library to upload cleaning job photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Rinsebase saves cleaning job photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Rinsebase uses the microphone for SOS emergency audio alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Rinsebase uses your location to verify you're at the correct property and to send clock-out reminders when you leave a job site.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Rinsebase uses your location to verify you're at the correct property.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Rinsebase uses your location to verify you're at the correct property and to remind you to clock out when you leave a job site.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Rinsebase uses your location to verify you're at the correct cleaning property.
